prompt: Create a standalone HTML file with a complete Space Invaders game. Use canvas, keyboard controls, scoring, lives, and wave progression. Save it as space-invaders.html

Create a single-file todo REST API in Node.js (todo-api.mjs) using only built-in modules (http). Support GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /todos with JSON body. Include in-memory storage. Make it runnable with 'node todo-api.mjs'.

Create a standalone HTML file (markdown-preview.html) with a split-pane markdown editor and live preview. Left side is a textarea, right side renders the markdown as HTML in real-time. Support headers, bold, italic, links, code blocks, and lists.
Create a standalone HTML file with a Snake game (snake.html). Canvas-based, arrow key controls, food spawning, score tracking, game over detection, and restart button.

Create a standalone HTML file (csv-tool.html) that lets users drag-and-drop a CSV file, parses it, shows a sortable table, and displays basic stats (row count, column types, min/max/avg for numeric columns).

Create a standalone HTML file (chat.html) with a chat UI that looks like iMessage. Dark theme, message bubbles (sent=blue right, received=gray left), input field with send button, timestamps, typing indicator animation. Use only HTML/CSS/JS.

Create a standalone HTML file (regex.html) with a regex tester tool. Input for regex pattern, input for test string, real-time highlighting of matches, match groups display, and common regex cheatsheet sidebar.

Create a standalone HTML file (sort-viz.html) that visualizes sorting algorithms. Show bars being sorted with animation. Support bubble sort, quicksort, and merge sort. Include speed control slider and array size input.
Create a standalone HTML file (calc.html) with a scientific calculator. Support basic ops, parentheses, trig functions, log, sqrt, pi, e. Dark theme, keyboard input support, calculation history.

Create a standalone HTML file (weather.html) with a mock weather dashboard. Show current weather, 5-day forecast cards, temperature chart using canvas, and a search bar. Use hardcoded sample data (no API calls). Responsive design.
